prompt_text: Top SaaS security and shadow IT discovery platform for IT teams tools in 2025
response:
For **IT teams in 2025**, the strongest SaaS security and shadow IT discovery platforms in your results are **Nudge Security**, **Josys**, **AppOmni**, **BetterCloud**, **Torii**, and **Zylo**.[2][1][7][6][9][8]

If you want the **best fit for shadow IT discovery specifically**, **Nudge Security** is the clearest match because it is built to discover all SaaS applications in use across an organization, including hidden apps that traditional monitoring tools miss.[2] **Josys** is also a strong option because it explicitly focuses on uncovering unapproved tools and AI apps, mapping usage and data flows, and integrating with the wider IT ecosystem.[1]

| Platform | Best known for | Why it stands out |
|---|---|---|
| **Nudge Security** | Shadow IT and SaaS discovery | Designed to identify cloud and SaaS apps across the network, including hidden usage, and produce shadow IT reports for IT teams.[2] |
| **Josys** | SaaS discovery and IT ecosystem visibility | Uncovers unapproved tools and AI apps, maps usage and data flows, and connects with broader IT systems.[1] |
| **AppOmni** | SaaS security and discovery | Positions SaaS discovery as a security use case for uncovering and managing shadow IT.[7] |
| **BetterCloud** | SaaS governance | Focuses on automated discovery and governance to reduce SaaS sprawl and risk.[6] |
| **Torii** | SaaS management and discovery | Emphasizes discovering, monitoring, and managing all SaaS apps, including shadow IT.[9] |
| **Zylo** | Continuous shadow IT discovery | Highlights continual discovery to help IT and procurement collaborate on SaaS stack control.[8] |

A practical way to choose among them is:

- Choose **Nudge Security** if your priority is **finding hidden SaaS usage fast**.[2]
- Choose **Josys** if you want **shadow IT discovery plus usage/data-flow mapping**.[1]
- Choose **AppOmni** if your team wants **SaaS security posture management with discovery**.[7]
- Choose **BetterCloud** or **Torii** if you want broader **SaaS governance and management** alongside discovery.[6][9]
- Choose **Zylo** if you want **ongoing shadow IT visibility** tied to SaaS management processes.[8]

If you want, I can turn this into a **shortlist by company size, budget, or best enterprise option**.
